About.metaDescription: KSaju is a fun, free saju toy for K-pop fans. Saju, but make it K. 🌙
About.title: About KSaju
About.tagline: KSaju is saju, but make it K.
About.intro: It's a fun, free little toy that turns your birthday into a Korean four-pillars (사주, saju) reading — then lets you check your cosmic chemistry with your K-pop bias.
About.sajuBody: Saju is a traditional Korean way of reading your destiny from the year, month, day, and hour you were born. For centuries people have used it to understand personality and relationships. We take that idea and make it light, colorful, and shareable.
About.canDoItem1: Enter your birthday and get your saju at a glance — your day master, your five-element balance, and a few fun fortune cards (money, love, career, this year).
About.canDoItem2After: to check your compatibility with a K-pop idol — or with anyone you like.
About.canDoItem3: Make a pretty card and share it with your friends. ✨
About.notBody: A serious fortune-telling service. We don't sell deep readings or tell you what to do with your life. KSaju is for fun and for sharing — a playful way to connect with K-pop and a slice of Korean culture.

FAQ.metaDescription: Common questions about KSaju — what saju is, how compatibility works, and your privacy.
FAQ.title: FAQ
FAQ.a1: Nope — KSaju is just for fun. Think of it as a personality toy with a Korean twist, not a prediction of your future.
FAQ.a2: Saju (사주) is traditional Korean four-pillars astrology. It reads the year, month, day, and hour of your birth as four "pillars," each tied to one of the five elements (wood, fire, earth, metal, water).
FAQ.a3: With classic five-element rules — which elements support or clash, and how the birth pillars meet. It's a transparent rule-based score, not random and not AI mysticism.
FAQ.a4Before: No. Your birthday is used in your browser to compute your saju. We only keep a coarse age range (like 18–24) for anonymous analytics — never your exact date. See our
FAQ.q5: Why K-pop idols? Where do their birthdays come from?
FAQ.a5: Because checking your chemistry with your bias is fun! Idol names and birthdays are public information. We don't use official photos or logos, and KSaju isn't affiliated with any artist or label.
FAQ.a7: Yes — every result can be turned into a card image you can save and post. ✨
FAQ.q8: I found a mistake, or my favorite idol is missing!
FAQ.a8: We'd love to hear it. Reach us at

Privacy.metaDescription: How KSaju handles your data. For entertainment 🌙
Privacy.title: Privacy
Privacy.intro: KSaju is a fun, for-entertainment saju toy. We keep data collection to a minimum.
Privacy.collectItem1: Anonymous usage events (pages viewed, buttons tapped) to understand how the site is used.
Privacy.collectItem2: A coarse age range (e.g. 18–24) derived from the birth date you enter. We never send or store your exact birth date.
Privacy.collectItem3: Approximate country, inferred from your IP address by our analytics provider.
Privacy.notItem1: No accounts, no login, no advertising profiles.
Privacy.notItem2: No cookies for analytics — events are anonymous and not linked across visits.
Privacy.notItem3: Your birth date is used in your browser to compute your saju; the raw date is not stored on our servers.
Privacy.thirdBody: We use PostHog for anonymous product analytics. Your usage events are processed by PostHog on our behalf.

Terms.metaDescription: The simple, human terms of using KSaju. For entertainment 🌙
Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.intro: By using KSaju, you agree to these simple terms. We've kept them short and human.
Terms.entertainmentBody: KSaju is a fun toy. Nothing here is professional advice — not for your relationships, health, finances, or any real-life decision. Please don't take it too seriously. 🌙
Terms.guaranteesBody: We offer KSaju "as is" and do our best to keep it fun and accurate, but we can't promise it's error-free or always available.
Terms.idolsBody: Idol names and birthdays are used as public information for entertainment. We don't use official photos or logos, and KSaju is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any artist, group, or label.
Terms.kindBody: KSaju is a light, friendly, all-ages space for fans. The "shipping" here is playful fun — keep it respectful.
Terms.cardsBody: Cards you create are yours to share. The KSaju name, design, and code belong to us.
Terms.changesBody: We may update these terms as KSaju grows. Continued use means you're okay with the latest version.
